description: The transit manager wants a report on which bus routes most frequently run late.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve historical GPS and schedule data for all bus routes over the past month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully queries the transit database.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data to calculate the on-time performance percentage for each route.

expected_outcome.value: The system calculates the performance metrics for every route.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report ranking the routes from worst to best on-time performance, highlighting the three worst-performing routes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a clear, actionable report for the transit manager.
